content.en:
"There is only one last assessment left, and after passing this assessment, I can leave the Ultimate Tower!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Then, he went to the last assessment.

The last assessment is not to fight with the projection of the ultimate supreme, but to create an ultimate arcane art that fits the way of creating the ultimate, which is also the most difficult assessment.

Although Ye Tian had created the ultimate path of ten thousand laws, he had not yet created the ultimate arcane art that fit the ultimate way of ten thousand laws.

The four ultimate arcane arts that he will now do, such as Lightning Step, Sky Tearing, Will Killing Sword, and Void Breaking, have nothing to do with the ultimate path of ten thousand laws, and the ultimate way of ten thousand laws is the ultimate way that he created, and the grade is far superior to other ultimate ways, but it is extremely difficult to create the ultimate arcane of this ultimate way.

Thankfully, he has 31 experience in creating the ultimate arcane, and now it is not too difficult to create an ordinary ultimate arcane, and the ultimate arcane in creating the ultimate path of ten thousand laws, although extremely difficult, still has a lot of hope, but it will take a long time.

"Then take the time to slowly research and create, the other Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters should be left far behind by me, they can't go out before me, I don't need to worry. "

At this time, his perception of fighting with many Ultimate Extreme Projections would be useful.

Those Ultimate Masters had all performed the ultimate arcane arts that fit the ultimate path he had created, and he had all comprehended them all, and naturally understood how terrifying the ultimate arcane that fit with his ultimate path was, and only needed a little energy to burst out with terrifying power, far from being comparable to other ultimate arcanes.

In the following days, Ye Tian didn't dare to comprehend, kept trying, combined with the ultimate supreme of ten thousand laws, and realized more and more, and created more and more ultimate killing moves, and gradually increased his own understanding of the ultimate way of ten thousand laws from countless ultimate killing moves.

He forgot all power, and only burst out the power of the ultimate path of ten thousand laws in the form of the ultimate arcane.

Failure after failure, experience increase again and again.

Ye Tian didn't know how many times he had failed, but every time it was an understanding, a progress, and an accumulation.

After countless accumulations and countless advances, Ye Tian finally comprehended an ultimate arcane art.

......

The ultimate tower is in the ultimate void of the final assessment.

Ye Tian's body exuded a pure white light, covering everything around him.

"Ten Thousand Laws White Domain, the ultimate way to suppress!"

This is the ultimate arcane created by Ye Tian, once this ultimate arcane is cast, it can suppress the ultimate way of others, so that the ultimate way of the other party cannot be cast.

It can be said that this ultimate arcane art is very terrifying, which is equivalent to weakening the strength of others, but not suppressing itself, which can turn the battlefield.

In other words, after the Ten Thousand Laws White Domain was unleashed, those Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords were like ants in his eyes, without the slightest power to resist.

But whether it can affect the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, he is still unclear, but it is estimated that he can also suppress the strength of the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, but even if the strength of the Ultimate Extreme Venerable is suppressed, he can still kill him in seconds.

"Congratulations to the Ten Thousand Laws for successfully clearing the Ultimate Tower!"

The voice of the Ultimate Venerable came.

Immediately after, a portal appeared.

Ye Tian walked out of the Ultimate Tower and came to the outside of the Ultimate Tower.

And at this time, Ye Tian saw the Doomsday Extreme Venerable, which should be the other party's body.

"I've seen the Doomsday Extreme Venerable!"

Ye Tian said very respectfully.

"Wanfa Extreme Venerable, you are very great, and you also let me win the bet with other Ultimate Extreme Venerables. Say, what reward do you want?" asked Doom Extreme.

After thinking for a while, Ye Tian said, "Lord Wanfa Jizun, I want to return to the Sea of Dimensions!"

"Go back to the Sea of Dimensions, you can, anyway, with your current strength, the Ultimate Land will not help him much, whether you can break through to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, there is no requirement for energy, you can still break through and impact the Ultimate Supreme Venerable in the Sea of Dimensions!"

With a wave of his hand, the Doomsday Supreme Venerable directly sent Ye Tian back to the Sea of Dimensions.

......

Sea of Dimensions.

Ye Tian randomly appeared in an area.

Feeling the familiar dimension of the sea of 750 and the familiar breath, his mood became better by the way.

In an instant, his mind moved, and his ultimate will covered the endless territory, and he quickly determined his position, and then shuttled towards the multidimensional territory.

Terran.

Compared to the past, the Terrans have changed a lot now.

Wow!

Ye Tian instantly appeared in an area of the human race, and then locked the breath of his relatives.

"It's good that they're still there!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

When Xiao Yue saw Ye Tian at first glance, she couldn't believe it at first, and immediately determined that it was Ye Tian himself, and immediately hugged her.

"Husband, you're back!"

"Well, I'm back!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Immediately, Xiao Yue was shocked and said, "Husband, have you broken through to the ultimate supreme realm?"

"No, but soon!"

Ye Tian said.
